headlines.headline: Plevyl Advisors reports unexpected decline in North America revenue

sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected decline in revenue for a key region is a direct negative signal for financial performance.

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business operations and do not imply immediate material financial impact.

headlines.headline: Halven Investments sees 15% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 15% drop in new customer orders indicates a significant weakening in demand that will likely impact future earnings.

headlines.headline: Zrovum Biopharma sees mixed results in data analytics pilot program

headlines.headline: Talvix Holdings explores strategic alternatives for precision manufacturing unit

sentiment.reasoning: Exploring strategic alternatives for a business unit creates significant uncertainty regarding the future structure and value of the company.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
